text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both flat to slightly negative, with BTC holding $60k support while ETH remains above $1.5k despite minimal momentum in either direction. Extreme Fear sentiment at 12 and declining over the week suggests capitulation-level pessimism, though the $60B daily volume is moderate and doesn't reflect panic liquidations. Bitcoin's dominance at 55.8% indicates capital is neither fleeing to alts nor rotating aggressively into them, consistent with a consolidation phase amid broader risk-off conditions.
